app.title: BilingualSub
app.subtitle: Bilingual Subtitle Generator for YouTube, X, TikTok & More
app.processing_desc: Please wait while we transcribe and translate.
app.downloads_desc: Your video has been successfully processed. You can download the subtitles separately or the burned-in video.
app.download_complete_desc: Video downloaded successfully. Ready to generate subtitles.
app.subtitling_desc: Please wait while we generate subtitles.

disclaimer.title: Please Read Before Downloading
disclaimer.tool_desc: BilingualSub is an open-source bilingual subtitle generator designed to assist with language learning and cross-language content comprehension.
disclaimer.copyright_desc: Subtitles generated by this tool are for personal learning and research purposes only. Please respect the copyright of the original content. Do not use downloaded content for commercial purposes or unauthorized distribution. Users are solely responsible for any legal consequences arising from the use of this tool.
